description_long: This object is a compact, tactical shotgun featuring a long cylindrical suppressor attached to the barrel, giving it an extended and streamlined appearance. The main body is constructed from matte black metal, with a polymer pistol grip that appears ergonomic and textured for secure handling. A folding or skeletal stock is attached to the rear, designed for stability and portability, and it is visually distinct from traditional full stocks. The trigger guard is rounded and moderately sized, providing ample space for finger placement and possibly gloved use. The overall design is modern and utilitarian, with minimal decorative elements and a focus on functionality. The shotgun's silhouette is sleek, with a pronounced suppressor and a tactical, urban-ready aesthetic.
description: A modern, compact shotgun with a long suppressor, ergonomic pistol grip, and a folding skeletal stock, finished in matte black.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, including the suppressor, pistol grip, and folding skeletal stock.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular opening of the suppressor and the narrow profile of the barrel.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the suppressor, grip, and stock.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the end of the folding stock and the slim profile of the shotgun.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with a long cylindrical suppressor; no ribbing or venting visible
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with a smooth contour and no visible finger grooves or reinforcement
